untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time microstructure analysis: (1) quantity imbalance detection across multiple markets with 2-stddev threshold, (2) cross-market order book synchronization within 5-second windows, (3) consecutive update tracking across venues, and (4) basis/dislocation monitoring in basis points. These require order book depth data, multi-venue order flow correlation, and tick-level microstructure indicators not present in the allowed indicator list (which only contains OHLCV and technical overlays). The signal is fundamentally about predictive order flow imbalance detection, not price action.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated market microstructure signal designed for high-frequency arbitrage. It requires: (1) real-time order imbalance metrics (not available—would need order book depth indicators), (2) cross-exchange latency-aware synchronization logic, (3) multi-leg basis tracking. The allowed indicator set is insufficient for quantitative microstructure analysis at the order-flow level required by this signal.
